results.rendered_html:
halā
1 A female friend.
2 The earth.
3 Water.
4 Spirituous liquor.
— ind. A vocative particle used in addressing a female friend; (only in theatrical language); halā śakuṃtale atraiva tāvanmuhūrtaṃ tiṣṭha  Ś. 1 ; cf. haṃḍā also.
